DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT JIM NORD'S MOTION TO COMPEL VERIFIED RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), AND REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE) IS MOOT AS SUPPLEMENTAL RESPONSES AND VERIFICATIONS HAVE BEEN SERVED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED AS THE MOTION WAS NOT ACCOMPANIED BY A DECLARATION SETTING FORTH FACTS SUPPORTING THE AMOUNT OF ANY MONETARY SANCTION SOUGHT. [SEE C.C.P. SECTION 2023.040.] LATE OPPOSITION HAS BEEN CONSIDERED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To File First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF DIANA MOY'S Motion To File First Amended Complaint IS GRANTED. NOTICE OF NON-OPPOSITION FILED ON JULY 28, 2010. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR # 11216 =301/PJB

Notice Of Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One) And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-04-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. DEFENDANT JIM NORD's Motion To Compel Verified Responses To Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One), And Request For Production Of Documents (Set One) is moot as supplemental responses and verifications have been served. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied as the motion was not accompanied by a declaration setting forth facts supporting the amount of any monetary sanction sought. [See C.C.P. Section 2023.040.] Late opposition has been considered. Prevailing party to submit a form of order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
